name: SpineDAG
summary: Universal Directed-Acyclic-Graph analyser. Point it at any folder, code project, Excel workbook, JSON/YAML config, or block of prose; it builds the dependency graph, finds hubs, leaves, orphans, cycles, and the critical path, scores Spine Health 0-100, and returns Markdown with a Mermaid diagram, ASCII tree, and a <spine-dag-json> envelope a UI can render.
tagline: Map the spine of anything in 30 seconds.

target.description: Absolute file path, folder path, or block of text.

text.description: Inline text when target is not a path.
